findings.description: Complete AI Agent System for OpenClaw — memory, self-healing, self-improvement, voice, automation

findings.title: Handit-AI/handit-examples

findings.title: EvoMap/awesome-agent-evolution
findings.description: A curated list of AI Agent evolution, memory systems, multi-agent architectures, and self-improvement projects. | evomap.ai

findings.title: privkeyio/evolve-mcp
findings.description: Universal MCP server for agent self-improvement via evolutionary algorithms.

findings.title: open-agent-studio/agent
findings.description: An autonomous, goal-oriented AI agent runtime with persistent memory, skill execution, and self-improvement capabilities. The agent acts as your digital employee, capable of breaking down high-level objectives into actionable tasks, executing them using a variety of skills, and learning from its experiences.

findings.title: Djtony707/TITAN
findings.description: TITAN — The Intelligent Task Automation Network. Autonomous AI agent framework with GPU VRAM orchestration, NVIDIA cuOpt/NIM integration, ~155 tools, 34 LLM providers, 15 channels, mesh networking, LiveKit voice, self-improvement, and a React dashboard. npm i -g titan-agent

findings.title: DavinciDreams/evolving-ai
findings.description: A sophisticated AI agent with self-improvement capabilities, long-term memory, dynamic context queries, and autonomous code modification abilities.

findings.title: ai-in-pm/Recursive-Self-Improvement-AI-Agent
findings.description: A Python framework implementing self-modifying AI agents based on Gödel's incompleteness theorems. This framework enables agents to analyze and modify their own code during runtime, achieve self-awareness, and recursively optimize their decision-making processes.

findings.title: choutos/agent-reliability-engineering
findings.description: Agent Reliability Engineering: applying SRE principles to AI agent systems. Evals, imp@k metrics, self-improvement, config versioning, transfer experiments.

findings.title: Patysko/ARIA
findings.description: AI agent with self-improvement, compressed memory, and an OpenClaw-style skill system. Runs locally with Ollama. Vibecoded with Claude Opus 4.6 and tested with codegemma:latest.

findings.title: sskarz/nanoclawbster
findings.description: Self-hosted Discord AI assistant powered by Claude Agent SDK — runs agents in isolated Docker containers with skills, memory, and self-improvement

findings.title: ShivankK26/AI-Voice-Agent
findings.description: A sophisticated AI-powered voice agent testing and self-improvement platform built with Next.js, Twilio, and Anthropic Claude. This application enables automated testing of voice agents using real phone calls, comprehensive analysis, and AI-driven script improvement.

findings.title: mfang0126/openclaw-skills
findings.description: A curated collection of OpenClaw AI agent skills — workspace optimization, diagram generation, search, self-improvement, and more.

findings.title: ObisDevs/node-typer-MCP
findings.description: 🧠 Ultimate MCP Server - 20 AI tools with autonomous cognition, self-improvement, and multi-modal processing for AI agents and workflows

findings.title: adityasasidhar/_an_autonomous_agent
findings.description: This project implements an autonomous AI agent capable of self-improvement by evolving its own system prompt (context) rather than fine-tuning weights. This approach is inspired by the research concept that "Fine-tuning is Dead" (in favor of dynamic context engineering).
